emails.subject: Carlos Vega Pay Plan Confirmation — 2026
emails.body_text:
Leah,

Please add this pay plan to your records for Carlos Vega, effective 01/01/2026:

Salesperson: Carlos Vega
Pay Plan (Graduated):
  - Units 1-2 per pay period: 20% of front gross
  - Units 3-4 per pay period: 25% of front gross
  - Unit 5 and above per pay period: 28% of front gross
Effective Date: 01/01/2026
Approved By: Derrick Soto (GM)

This applies to all deals posted on or after 01/01/2026. Tiers reset each pay period (1st-15th and 16th-end of month).

Hannah Price
HR Manager
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: GAP Chargeback — Deal 4492 / Patricia Dunn — Commission Impact
emails.body_text:
Leah and Sofia,

We received a SafeGuard GAP chargeback today on Deal 4492. This impacts Megan Price's previously paid commission from the March period.

Chargeback Details:
- Deal: 4492
- Customer: Patricia Dunn
- Product: SafeGuard GAP (cancelled)
- Chargeback Amount: $1,400
- Received: 04/10/2026
- Original Contract Date: 03/05/2026

Affected Salesperson:
- Megan Price (salesperson)
- Sofia Ramirez (F&I Manager)

Please coordinate on next steps for this offset.

Expected April 1-15 Commission for Megan: approximately $1,050 (3 delivered units × $350).

Jasmine Patel
Senior Deal Posting Specialist
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Chargeback Offset Approval Request — Megan Price — $1,400 (Deal 4492)
emails.body_text:
Marcus,

I'm requesting your approval to offset a SafeGuard GAP chargeback against Megan Price's April 1-15 commission payment.

Chargeback Details:
- Amount: $1,400
- Deal: 4492 (Patricia Dunn, original 03/05/2026)
- Product: SafeGuard GAP (cancelled)
- Received: 04/10/2026
- Reason: Product cancellation

Commission Impact:
- Megan's earned April 1-15 commission: approximately $1,050 (3 delivered units × $350 flat rate)
- Offset amount: $1,400
- Resulting shortfall: $350 (offset exceeds earned commission)

Recommendation:
- Apply the full $1,400 offset against her April 1-15 commission ($1,050)
- Carry the $350 balance forward to the next pay period (May)

Please advise how you'd like to proceed.

Leah Morgan
Payroll & Commissions Analyst
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: RE: Chargeback Offset Approval Request — Megan Price — $1,400 (Deal 4492)
emails.body_text:
Leah,

APPROVED: Apply the full $1,400 offset against Megan Price's April 1-15 commission payment.

Offset Authorization:
- Employee: Megan Price
- Chargeback: $1,400 (Deal 4492, GAP cancellation)
- Earned Commission (April 1-15): $1,050
- Offset: $1,400 against $1,050 commission
- Shortfall: $350

Handling the $350 Shortfall:
- Carry the $350 balance forward to the next pay period (May 1-15)
- Do NOT reduce her base hourly pay — this offset applies ONLY to commission earnings
- Do NOT reduce her compensation below minimum wage

Critical Next Step:
- You must send Megan a written notification BEFORE processing the offset
- Copy me (Marcus Hale) and Hannah Price on the notification
- The notification must clearly explain:
  * The GAP chargeback amount and deal
  * The offset calculation
  * Her April 1-15 commission impact
  * The $350 carry-forward to next period
  * Her right to dispute if applicable

Do not process the offset until the written notification has been sent and acknowledged.

Marcus Hale
Assistant Controller
Sunshine & Set Automotive
